evidence.anxiety: hidden_tension: 'Secretly fears that she is becoming her father... and that Farah will eventually stop waiting for her'
evidence.depression: Still engaged with hobbies (marathon training, calligraphy, mentoring) but some loss of control: 'I just cannot figure out how to do less'
evidence.trauma: Father's work-obsession shapes current behavior: 'My father worked 70-hour weeks... I told myself I would be different'
evidence.escalation_tendency: bid_style = neutral, collaborative approach: 'I want to work through it together rather than let it sit'

evidence.anxiety: Core Belief: 'If I do not maintain my career momentum, I will lose the independence and identity I have worked my entire life to build.'
evidence.depression: Recurring arguments were 'eroding their ability to enjoy the life they had built together.'
evidence.trauma: Hidden Tension: 'Secretly fears that she is becoming her father, who prioritized work over family.'
evidence.escalation_tendency: Coping strategy: 'frames work demands as non-negotiable when they are actually choices.'

evidence.anxiety: Secretly fears that she is becoming her father, who prioritized work over family.

evidence.depression: core_belief: 'If I always come second to my partner's priorities, then I do not truly matter'; own career has been quietly deprioritized

evidence.escalation_tendency: bid_style: neutral; uses questions to invite reflection rather than direct accusations; 'I always understand. I just wish understanding went both ways sometimes'
